content:
```diff
--- /dev/null
+++ packages/ui/src/engine/day-night-cycle-design.md
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+# Day/Night Cycle Visual Theme Design Document
+
+## Overview
+This document specifies the design for the day/night cycle system in the pixel engine. The system features a continuous 5-minute cycle composed of day, sunset, night, and sunrise phases, each with distinct visual themes and color overlays. The overlay is applied as a final compositing step after all rooms are drawn.
+
+---
+
+## Cycle Duration and Phases
+- **Total cycle duration:** 5 minutes (300 seconds)
+- **Phases:**
+  - **Day:** 2 minutes 30 seconds (150 seconds)
+  - **Sunset:** 30 seconds
+  - **Night:** 2 minutes (120 seconds)
+  - **Sunrise:** 30 seconds
+
+The cycle repeats continuously in the above order.
+
+---
+
+## Visual Modes and Effects
+
+### Day Mode
+- **Ambient Light:** Warm white ambient light
+  - RGB: (255, 244, 214) — a soft warm white tone
+- **Torches:** Subtle glow, minimal intensity
+  - Torch light intensity: low
+- **Overlay:** None (transparent)
+
+### Sunset Transition
+- **Ambient Light:** Gradual shift from warm white to darker tones
+  - Color shifts smoothly from day RGB (255,244,214) to night base RGB (0,0,40)
+- **Torches:** Increasing glow intensity from subtle to prominent
+
+### Night Mode
+- **Ambient Light:** Dark blue overlay applied
+  - Overlay color: rgba(0, 0, 40, 0.4)
+- **Torches:** Prominent glow, high intensity
+  - Torch light intensity: high
+- **Windows:** Show star content (star sprites visible through windows)
+
+### Sunrise Transition
+- **Ambient Light:** Gradual shift from night dark blue to warm white
+  - Color shifts smoothly from night base RGB (0,0,40) to day RGB (255,244,214)
+- **Torches:** Decreasing glow intensity from prominent to subtle
+
+---
+
+## Overlay Application
+- The dark blue overlay (rgba(0,0,40,0.4)) is applied as a final compositing step after all rooms and elements are drawn.
+- During day and transition phases, the overlay opacity and color shift values interpolate smoothly.
+
+---
+
+## Color Shift Values Per Phase
+| Phase   | Duration (s) | Ambient RGB          | Overlay Color (rgba)    | Torch Intensity | Notes                       |
+|---------|--------------|----------------------|------------------------|-----------------|-----------------------------|
+| Day     | 150          | (255, 244, 214)      | rgba(0,0,0,0)          | Low             | Warm white ambient, subtle torches |
+| Sunset  | 30           | Interpolate day → night | Interpolate 0 → 0.4 opacity | Increasing      | Transition from day to night |
+| Night   | 120          | (0, 0, 40)           | rgba(0,0,40,0.4)       | High            | Dark blue overlay, prominent torches, stars visible |
+| Sunrise | 30           | Interpolate night → day | Interpolate 0.4 → 0 opacity | Decreasing      | Transition from night to day |
+
+---
+
+## Summary
+This design ensures a smooth and visually distinct day/night cycle with clear transitions and appropriate ambient lighting and overlays. The overlay application as a final compositing step guarantees consistent visual effects across all rooms.
```
